Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Candace Fisher.
Attorney Francisco Torres appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Suluvale Paopao and Lance Tisega are present.
Attorney Alex Haskell representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A , for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of June 17, 2013 remains on calendar.(501/JPT)
